aleabit.layer_label: Layer 4 — 锑/铅锌/黄金多金属
aleabit.thesis: Antimony + lead/zinc + gold miner — antimony is genuine chokepoint metal (China export controls 2024). 22B RMB MC, antimony is in real shortage. PB 5.12 = market already noticed.

signals.name: 供应链汇聚
signals.note: 中国占全球锑供应 60%+，华钰是主要矿企之一

signals.name: 材料价格 ATH
signals.note: 锑价 2024-2025 大幅 ATH 后回调

signals.name: 分析师覆盖率 < 3
signals.note: 国内已被关注但西方少

signals.name: 政府/国防关联
signals.note: 锑出口管制 2024 落地，军工/阻燃剂关键

red_flags: AI 关联弱，更多是军工/光伏阻燃剂
aleabit.ai_relevance: Indirect — antimony in flame retardants for data center cabling, but mostly defense/PV exposure
